# Quarto Website Notes

Source URLs:
- https://quarto.org/docs/websites/
- https://quarto.org/docs/publishing/github-pages.html

## Useful reminders

- Use `_quarto.yml` as the project-level configuration file.
- Set `project.output-dir` when the rendered site should land outside the source folder.
- Use website navbar and sidebar configuration together for larger training sites.
- Fully run `quarto render` before deployment when global config or assets change.
- GitHub Pages can publish from a rendered `docs/` folder or from a dedicated publish branch.
